content_reports_single_target_check.name: content_reports_single_target_check
content_reports_single_target_check.value: (case when "app"."content_reports"."artwork_id" is null then 0 else 1 end + case when "app"."content_reports"."comment_id" is null then 0 else 1 end) = 1

content_reports_review_resolution_check.name: content_reports_review_resolution_check
content_reports_review_resolution_check.value: ("app"."content_reports"."status" = 'pending' and "app"."content_reports"."reviewed_by" is null and "app"."content_reports"."reviewed_at" is null) or ("app"."content_reports"."status" <> 'pending' and "app"."content_reports"."reviewed_by" is not null and "app"."content_reports"."reviewed_at" is not null)
